cases.name: broken ha-conventions references removed
cases.description: Active skills/docs should not route to a non-existent ha-conventions skill.

cases.name: README invariant count consistency
cases.description: README should remain aligned to eight safety invariants.

cases.name: core docs use explicit deploy wording
cases.description: Canonical docs should use explicit deploy-request wording.

cases.name: deploy settings schema includes branch and remote hierarchy
cases.description: Settings schema should preserve preferred deploy keys and legacy fallback keys.

cases.name: trace helper builds websocket URLs with api prefix
cases.description: Base-path Home Assistant installs should resolve to /api/websocket.

checks.command:
@'
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('trace_fetch', Path('helpers/trace-fetch.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.build_ws_url('https://example.com/homeassistant'))
print(mod.build_ws_url('http://ha.local:8123'))
'@ | python -

@'
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('trace_fetch', Path('helpers/trace-fetch.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.build_ws_url('https://example.com/homeassistant'))
print(mod.build_ws_url('http://ha.local:8123'))
'@ | python -

cases.name: area search ignores empty metadata matches
cases.description: Blank registry fields should not match every area query.

checks.command:
@'
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('area_search', Path('helpers/area-search.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.area_matches('', '', 'kitchen'))
print(mod.area_matches('kitchen', '', 'kitchen'))
'@ | python -

@'
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('area_search', Path('helpers/area-search.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.area_matches('', '', 'kitchen'))
print(mod.area_matches('kitchen', '', 'kitchen'))
'@ | python -

cases.name: ha-analyze forbids approximate metrics
cases.description: Analysis guidance should require exact counts or not available.

checks.contains: Never use approximate counts. If you cannot measure a value exactly, write `not available`.

cases.name: ha-analyze requires an evidence table
cases.description: Analysis reports should show what ran vs skipped with exact values.

cases.name: ha-analyze forbids direct mutation
cases.description: Analysis should route to a downstream skill rather than editing or deploying.

checks.contains: Do NOT edit config files directly or deploy from `/ha-analyze`.
Route to exactly one appropriate skill

cases.name: trace helper preserves timezone offsets
cases.description: Rendered trace timestamps should keep timezone information.

checks.command:
@'
import importlib.util
from pathlib import Path
spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('trace_fetch', Path('helpers/trace-fetch.py'))
mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
print(mod.format_timestamp('2026-03-08T17:36:11+00:00'))
print(mod.format_timestamp('2026-03-08T17:36:11Z'))
'@ | python -

cases.name: ha-overview snapshot emits stable JSON
cases.description: Overview helper should always return parseable JSON with metrics and sources.

checks.command:
@'
import json
import subprocess
import sys
proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'helpers/ha-overview.py', 'snapshot'], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
print(proc.returncode)
data = json.loads(proc.stdout)
print(sorted(data.keys()))
print('metrics' in data and 'sources' in data)
print(sorted(data['metrics'].keys())[:4])
'@ | python -

@'
import json
import subprocess
import sys
proc = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'helpers/ha-overview.py', 'snapshot'], capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
data = json.loads(proc.stdout)
print('areas' in data['metrics'])
print('automations' in data['metrics'])
print('states' in data['sources'])
'@ | python -

cases.name: automation entity ID alias derivation documented
cases.description: Skills should document that entity IDs derive from alias, not the id field.

cases.name: mid-sequence condition gate pattern documented
cases.description: Automation docs should document mid-sequence conditions as gates.

cases.name: ha-lovelace allowed-tools includes Bash
cases.description: SKILL.md must allow Bash for helper and hass-cli access after BL-019/BL-021.

cases.name: ha-lovelace references dashboard-guide
cases.description: SKILL.md must reference the dashboard-guide.md for card types and layout.

cases.name: ha-lovelace save contract requires lovelace-dashboard.py
cases.description: SKILL.md save workflow must use the helper, not ad hoc WebSocket calls.

cases.name: ha-lovelace entity preflight before save
cases.description: SKILL.md must require entity validation before dashboard saves.

checks.contains: Do NOT save until all entities resolve

cases.name: ha-lovelace sections one-at-a-time rule
cases.description: SKILL.md must prohibit bulk section replacement.

cases.name: ha-lovelace custom card fallback order
cases.description: SKILL.md must define a stable documentation lookup order for custom cards.

cases.name: dashboard-api.md documents null success contract
cases.description: The API reference must document that null result on save is success.

cases.name: lovelace-dashboard.py has all three subcommands
cases.description: Helper must expose fetch, save-and-verify, and find-entities.

cases.name: dashboard-guide.md covers grid_options.rows sizing
cases.description: Dashboard guide must include the rows sizing table from BL-020.

cases.name: common-patterns uses 2024+ syntax
cases.description: Automation patterns must not use deprecated platform: or service: keys.

cases.name: duplicate id regression half
cases.description: Harness should keep this regression case distinct from the capability case with the same id.
